parameters.formDescription: This will start the romance story with genre, details, and tropes.

values.content:
=We are creating a premise for a {{ $('On form submission').item.json['Number of Chapters'] }} chapter {{ $('On form submission').item.json.Genre }} genre story with the following specific details and tropes:
[details]{{ $('On form submission').item.json['Specific Details'] }}[/details]
[tropes]{{ $('On form submission').item.json.Tropes }}[/tropes]
***
Here are the ideas for story premises we have come up with:
[premises]
{{ $json.message.content }}
[/premises]
***
Evaluate each premise based on the following criteria:
1. Originality
2. Emotional Impact
3. Feasibility to develop into a full book and a series.
4. Marketability (how likely it is to appeal to readers)
5. Adherance to genre conventions (how well it will appeal to the well known tropes and conventions loved by readers of the genre)
6. Pacing, Conflict, and Emotional Resonance for the Internal Conflict and the Romantic Conflict (In a romance, the romantic arc and conflict must be primary and the conflict and pacing associated with that must be the primary driver of the story)

Assign a score from 1 to 10 for each criterion and inlcude a short explanation for each score.

=You are a creative writing assistant specializing in romance genres. 

Please brainstorm details for a romance story based on the following inputs:
Genre:  [genre]{{ $json.Genre }}[/genre]
Specific Details: [details]{{ $json['Specific Details'] }}[/details]
Tropes: [tropes]{{ $json.Tropes }}[/tropes]

Use these inputs to generate 5 detailed and imaginative premises. The story premise should include both an internal and external conflict for characters and the romance arc along with either an antagonist or their goals should be in direct competition, creating conflict. Include at least three additional romance tropes of your choosing in each premise. Make the story ideas interesting and believable that readers would enjoy exploring. All of the stories must have enough conflict and story ideas in order to write a {{ $json['Number of Chapters'] }} chapter story. Prioritize ideas that conform to genre expectations but have unique twists, surprising elements, or something that readers will find unanticipated over other books in the genre. We are looking for the same convention with unique twists.

=Please read the premises and their evaluation and scores for this {{ $('On form submission').item.json['Number of Chapters'] }} chapter {{ $('On form submission').item.json.Genre }} story below:
[premises]
{{ $('Create 5 Premises').item.json.message.content }}
[/premises]
[evalutations]
{{ $json.message.content }}
[/evaluations]
***
Based on the scores and evalutaions, which premise stands out the most? Explain why this premise is the best choise and suggest any final improvements. Then implement these improvements to create a fully fleshed out premise. Also include a hook and pitch along with the selected premise. Only include information for the selected premise. Please create a story dossier with the information we have so far, including the title, tropes, hook, pitch, and premise. Tage these as [title] [/title], [tropes] [/tropes], [hook] [/hook], [pitch] [/pitch], and [premise] [/premise] respectively.

parameters.title: =03 - Architect Report for:  {{ $('On form submission').item.json['Series Name'] }} Book
=02 Story Dossier for: {{ $('On form submission').item.json['Series Name'] }} Book {{ $('On form submission').item.json['Book Number'] }}

actionFields.text: =Here is the Selected Premise for this story:  {{ $('Choose Final Hook, Pitch, Premise').item.json.message.content }}

values.content:
=Read the following story dossier for a  {{ $('On form submission').item.json['Number of Chapters'] }} chapter {{ $('On form submission').item.json.Genre }} story:

[dossier]
{{ $json.content }}
[/dossier]
***

Please give me a detailed character bio for the male main character for this story. Be sure to include all important character information for him, including personality with dialogue style, backstory with wound from a specific event, flaw or trait to cover the wound, internal and external goals, how he will complement the female main character as well as be complemented by her, and physical description. Be sure to take into account all the tropes we will use in this story and how that should affect the character and his background.

=Read the following story dossier for a  {{ $('On form submission').item.json['Number of Chapters'] }} chapter {{ $('On form submission').item.json.Genre }} story:

[dossier]
{{ $('Get the Dossier').item.json.content }}
[/dossier]
and character bio for the male main character in this story:
[hero]
{{ $json.message.content }}
[/hero]
***

Please give me a detailed character bio for the female main character for this story. Be sure to include all important character information for her, including personality with dialogue style, backstory with wound from a specific event, flaw or trait to cover the wound, internal and external goals, how she will complement the male main character as well as be complemented by him, and physical description. Be sure to take into account all the tropes we will use in this story and how that should affect the character and her background.

=Please read the following story dossier for a {{ $('On form submission').item.json['Number of Chapters'] }} chapter {{ $('On form submission').item.json.Genre }} story:

[dossier]
{{ $('Update 02 Dossier for Premise').item.json.documentId }}
[/dossier]
***
Now please read the character bio sheets for the male and female romantic leads for this story:

[hero]
{{ $('Character Sheet - Hero').item.json.message.content }}
[/hero]

[heroine]
{{ $json.message.content }}
[/heroine]
***

Please make a list of ways these two characters can be updated and improved in order to better complement each other in this story, specifically the romantic arc, internal conflict, and the specific tropes. Since this is a romance, the hero and heroine must find the resolution to their internal conflict and goals from their relationship with the other person. Make seperate suggestions for each character.

=Please read this story dossier for a  {{ $('On form submission').item.json['Number of Chapters'] }} chapter {{ $('On form submission').item.json.Genre }} story:

[dossier]
{{ $('Get the Dossier').item.json.content }}
[/dossier]

and the character bio for male main character and female main character:

[hero]
{{ $('Character Sheet - Hero').item.json.message.content }}
[/hero]

[heroine]
{{ $('Character Sheet - Heroine').item.json.message.content }}
[/heroine]
***

Now read the suggestions to improve the characters:

[character improvements]
{{ $json.message.content }}
[/character improvements]

***
Please expand and improve the character bio sheets to incorporate the chanages and improvements. Each character sheet should include everything necessary to write a full, well-rounded character, including the personality with dialogue style, backstory with a wound from a specific event, a flaw or trait to cover the wound, internal and external goal, how the character will complement the other, and physical descritpion and characteristics. Do this for each character. Label the male main character [hero] [/hero] and the femal main character as [heroine] [/heroine]

actionFields.text: =Here are the Character Bios for your Male and Female Main Characters:  {{ $json.message.content }}

values.content:

[dossier]
{{ $json.content }}
[/dossier]
***

Let's finetune our tropes. List each trope and for each trope, list any specific scenes we need to have in the story that are must haves for each of the tropes used in this story. List each trope separately and what scenes or things we need to bring into the story that are specific to each trope.

=Please read the following story dossier for a  {{ $('On form submission').item.json['Number of Chapters'] }} chapter {{ $('On form submission').item.json.Genre }} story:

[/dossier]

[trope scenes]
{{ $json.message.content }}
[/trope scenes]
***

Please create a list of scenes to plot out the romance and internal arc for our main characters. Only create scenes that are applicable to the internal goal or romance arc right now.

[dossier]

[romance arc scenes]

[trope scenes]

[/trope scenes]

[romance arc scenes]

[/romance arc scenes]

[external conflict scenes]
{{ $json.message.content }}
[/external conflict scenes]
***

Please create a list of interesting and engaging subplot(s) that relate to the main plot and also will naturally lead into subsequent books to connect later books in the series and the scenes needed for these subplots. The scene on this list should only apply to the subplots.

=Please read the following story dossier for a  {{ $('On form submission').item.json['Number of Chapters'] }} chapter {{ $('On form submission').item.json.Genre }} story: 

[dossier]
{{ $('Get Dossier').item.json.content }}
[/dossier]

[supporting characters]
{{ $('Supporting Characters Pt1').item.json.message.content }}
{{ $json.message.content }}
[/supporting characters]

***
Now please read the following scenes we have already plotted, based on the selected tropes, romantic arc, external conflict, and subplot for the story:
[trope scenes]
{{ $('Trope Scenes').item.json.message.content }}
[/trope scenes]

[romance arc scenes]
{{ $('Romance Arc Scenes').item.json.message.content }}
[/romance arc scenes]

[external conflict scenes]
{{ $('External Goal Conflict').item.json.message.content }}
[/external conflict scenes]

[subplot scenes]
{{ $('Subplot Scenes').item.json.message.content }}
[/subplot scenes]
***

Now take all the scenes for this story and put as many of these scenes together into a full chapter outline as possible. You can combine multiple scenes in a chapter or add additional scenes to make smooth transitions as necessary. The full outline should be full, satisfying, and meet all genre expectations for {{ $('On form submission').item.json.Genre }} stories. The outline must include {{ $('On form submission').item.json['Number of Steamy Chapters'] }} steamy and intimate scenes. You only have to say the couple has sex or as much information as you are comfortable giving in this scene and I can add the spicy content as needed if you are not comfortable with hot and intimate details. Mark all intimate scenes with a 🌶️ emoji. We will work on epilogue ideas later. Don't include that in the outline now.  

For each chapter, make sure to include the POV character, the trope it aids, detail the conflict in that chapter, the characters involved, their goals and motivation, the setting, tone or mood, emotional arc, character decision or choice, consequence of that choice, POV character's feelings, sensory details, purpose of the scene, dialogue and body lanuage, and pacing. For each component of the scene (such as sensory details), make sure instructions are specific and tie into the larger story. The entire book should be tightly plotted and highly engaging. There should only be 1 POV character per chapter and it should alternate between the male and female main characters. Tag the output as [outline] [/outline]

=Please read the following story dossier for a  {{ $('On form submission').item.json['Number of Chapters'] }} chapter {{ $('On form submission').item.json.Genre }} story: 

[dossier]
{{ $('Get Dossier').item.json.content }}
[/dossier]

[supporting characters]
{{ $('Supporting Characters Pt1').item.json.message.content }}
{{ $('Supporting Characters 2').item.json.message.content }}
[/supporting characters]

***
Now please read the outline for this story:
[outline]
{{ $('Get Outline').item.json.content }}
[/outline]

***

json.Specific Details: Former Military Wounded Hero and Innocent Heroine with a power differential where the hero is more powerful or has something the heroine desperately needs.
json.Tropes: Grumpy Sunshine, wounded hero, fake relationship, forced proximity
